key_themes: Significant defense contract wins (naval, satellite comms, acoustic projects)
Record H1 revenue and strong order book (>£600m) providing visibility
Strong Buy analyst consensus with ~20-25% average upside
Geopolitical tailwinds driving European/UK defense spending
Consistent dividend growth despite H1 profitability pressures
summary: Cohort plc (CHRT.L), a UK defense technology group, is seeing positive investor sentiment driven by multiple contract wins totaling tens of millions of pounds/euros across subsidiaries (EID €42.3m Portuguese Navy, MCL £17.9m, EM Solutions ~£11.5m satellite comms). H1 2026 delivered record revenue of £128.8m and a sustained strong order book, though adjusted profits saw modest pressure; the interim dividend was increased 10%. With a Strong Buy consensus, average targets around 1,670p (from current ~1,350p), and exposure to rising defense budgets, the outlook is constructive despite some stock volatility off its highs.[[1]](https://www.investing.com/equities/cohort-plc-consensus-estimates)[[2]](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/cohort-plc-fra-c7k-h1-010025930.html)
sources: 10+ relevant recent X posts/RNS notifications (contracts, holdings, discussions), 8+ news articles and releases (LSE RNS, Yahoo Finance, Morningstar, company site), Analyst consensus from 5 firms (Strong Buy, avg target ~£1,670)
